source_product_label: FDA 2016 grape and grape-containing juice category
substitution_rule: No substitution was made for NS/not-speciated inorganic arsenic rows. Deterministic nearest-rank percentiles use the 58 quantified full-table iAs cells only; the FDA source-reported all-sample category average is 12.4 ppb.
n_text: 58 quantified iAs cells from 61 FDA grape-category rows; 3 NS rows excluded from percentile math
statistic_scope: FDA 2016 grape and grape-containing juice category; quantified full-table iAs cells only; includes some grape blends and one FDA-designated white-grape-peach mixed juice.
field_value_summary: iAs quantified N=58; p50=11.2 ppb; p90=22.6 ppb; p95=25.6 ppb; max=49.6 ppb; FDA category mean=12.4 ppb
notes: FDA category includes grape, white grape, grape blends, apple-grape blends, and one white-grape-peach mixed juice that FDA included in grape calculations. Use as species-specific grape-category context, not a full non-apple juice aggregate.
